name: ruby-ethon
title: ruby-ethon
description:
libcurl wrapper using ffi
Very lightweight libcurl wrapper.
.
In Greek mythology, Ethon, the son of Typhoeus and Echidna, is a gigantic
eagle. So much for the history. In the modern world, Ethon is a very basic
libcurl wrapper using ffi
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-ethon because libcurl wrapper using ffi.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-ethon as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-ethon with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-ethon --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
